long_description:
[Acadia-SRE]-Image Pull Back Off [ALL-PROD] is Triggered

TIP Runbook URL: https://github.ibm.com/storage-sre-and-operations/SOP/blob/main/control_plane/sysdig_alerts/kube_pod_alerts.md#5-pods-image-pull-back-off
TIP Situation: Observed kube-error-pod imagepullbackoff issue in Acadia-Kube
TIP Short Description: Pod image pull backoff
 TIP Console: toc
TIP CRN: crn:v1:::is-volume-acadia:::mzone767:microservice: 
IPOPS Enabled: False

Event Generated:

Severity:         Medium
Metric:
    sum by(reason, kube_pod_name, kube_cluster_name) (kube_pod_container_status_waiting_reason{kube_pod_name=~"acadia.*", reason=~"ErrImagePull|ImagePullBackOff", kube_pod_name!~"acadia-image-.*"}) > 0 = 1
Segment:
    kube_cluster_name = 'mzone767' and kube_pod_name = 'acadia-agent-hsn9t' and reason = 'ErrImagePull'

Time:             12/02/2025 08:58 AM UTC
State:            Triggered
Notification URL: https://us-east.monitoring.cloud.ibm.com:443/api/oauth/openid/IBM/2c4a1985f9d5c10bd4842d2d3989088e/a22d4a2e-0c44-4662-91bc-3607d0e2348f?redirectRoute=%2Fevents%2Fnotifications%2Fl%3A2419200%2F43875702%2Fdetails

------

Triggered by Alert:

Type:         Prometheus
Name:         [Acadia-SRE]-Image Pull Back Off [ALL-PROD]
Description:  Acadia-Kube Image Pull Back Off for last 1 min
Team:         Monitor Operations
Scope:
    Everywhere
Alert When:   sum by(reason, kube_pod_name, kube_cluster_name) (kube_pod_container_status_waiting_reason{kube_pod_name=~"acadia.*", reason=~"ErrImagePull|ImagePullBackOff", kube_pod_name!~"acadia-image-.*"}) > 0
Duration: 1 m
Alert URL:    https://us-east.monitoring.cloud.ibm.com:443/api/oauth/openid/IBM/2c4a1985f9d5c10bd4842d2d3989088e/a22d4a2e-0c44-4662-91bc-3607d0e2348f?redirectRoute=%2Falerts%2Frules%3FalertId%3D476945
